data.title: What's Going On With Archer Aviation (ACHR) Stock?
data.description: Archer Aviation shares are trading higher by 10.7% during Friday's session. The company recently partnered with Anduril for defense VTOLs, raised $430 million and expanded eVTOL efforts.
